phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove parte il ferry per Capri, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh PAR-teh eel FERRY per KAH-pree, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, quanto costa il biglietto per Capri, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, KWAN-toh KOS-tah eel bee-lyet-toh per KAH-pree, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: It is indicated at the ticket office.

phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si convalida il biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see kon-VAL-ee-dah eel bee-lyet-toh, per fah-VOH-reh

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get down to Marina Piccola from the town
phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si scende alla Marina Piccola dal centro?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see SHEN-deh AL-lah mah-REE-nah pee-KOH-lah dal CHEN-troh?

responses.english: By the lift on Via del Mare, or down the stairs.
responses.phonetic: kon lah-shen-SOH-reh een VEE-ah del MAH-reh, oh per leh SKAH-leh.
responses.local: Con l'ascensore in Via del Mare, o per le scale.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to rent a boat at the marina
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove si noleggiano le barche alla Marina Piccola?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh see noh-lej-JAH-noh leh BAR-keh AL-lah mah-REE-nah pee-KOH-lah?

responses.english: From the hire operators on the jetty, easy to spot.
responses.phonetic: dai noh-LEJ-jee sool pon-TEE-leh, ben vee-ZEE-bee-lee.
responses.local: Dai noleggi sul pontile, ben visibili.
